description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image, runs apt-get update -yqqq; apt-get -o dir::cache::archives="vendor/apt" install -y -qq --force-yes libicu-dev cmake in before_script, installs bundler via gem install bundler, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc). Define an elasticsearch:5.1 service and set the ELASTICSEARCH_HOST variable to elasticsearch. Add an rspec job in the default test stage that executes rspec. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
